content:
# Meta-Rule: Gradient Flow Optimization v90

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.88
AND tile_novelty > 0.80
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 8 automated workers
2. Explore high-uncertainty regions
3. Generate 9 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 13.6% improvement in insight quality
